title: Schefter’s NFL draft week intel: Nuggets on top picks, intriguing prospects, QBs and trade candidates
content: How early could Jeremiyah Love be drafted? Will Ty Simpson go in Round 1? Could we still see A.J. Brown traded? Adam Schefter has the latest.

title: 49ers, Williams settle deal drama with $50M pact
content: The San Francisco 49ers and left tackle Trent Williams agreed to a two-year, $50 million extension, his agency announced Monday.

title: Sources: Bulls get OK to interview multiple execs
content: The Bulls have started the search for their new head of basketball operations, receiving permission to interview multiple NBA executives, sources told ESPN.

title: Amid threats, Yanks' Schlittler excited to face Sox
content: Yankees pitcher Cam Schlittler said he and his family have received threats ahead of his start vs. the Red Sox, but he's "excited" to be making his Fenway Park debut.

title: Wemby tops Duncan with 35 in Spurs playoff debut
content: Victor Wembanyama scored 35 points, the most by a Spurs player making his postseason debut, while leading a 111-98 win over the Trail Blazers in Game 1 of their first-round series Sunday night.

title: OK State lands top transfer Crooks from Iowa St.
content: Former Iowa State center Audi Crooks, No. 1 in ESPN's women's basketball transfer rankings, committed to Oklahoma State, she announced Sunday night.

title: Bengals extend Lawrence after blockbuster trade
content: Defensive tackle Dexter Lawrence II passed his physical with the Bengals and signed a one-year, $28 million extension, the Win Sports Group told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

title: Hug wins ninth Boston Marathon wheelchair title
content: Marcel Hug of Switzerland won his ninth Boston Marathon men's wheelchair title Monday, riding a tailwind to finish in an unofficial time of 1 hour, 16 minutes, 6 seconds. He missed breaking his own course record by 33 seconds.

title: Indiana DC claps back at Simpson, Alabama fans
content: Indiana defensive coordinator Bryant Haines heard the comments from former Alabama quarterback Ty Simpson about the teams' matchup last season in the Rose Bowl and responded with his own observations.

title: ✨ Top 50 players in the 2026 Stanley Cup playoffs
content: As 16 teams face off for the ultimate prize in pro sports, these players will have the biggest impact.

title: WrestleMania 42 Night 2 takeaways: Will Reigns make this title run alone?
content: Roman Reigns is champion once again, but what should fans expect in the latest title reign of the OTC?

title: The player most likely to be traded for all 30 MLB teams -- and 6 if-all-goes-wrong candidates
content: From major league stars to prospects to if-all-goes-wrong candidates, here's who could be on the trade block come August.

title: LeBron does it again, and one team has a big problem: Windhorst on the first weekend of the playoffs
content: A 25-year-old LeBron strategy for the Lakers, a new defense in Cleveland and a message from Oklahoma City: Here's what we learned as the postseason tipped off.

title: Even in retirement, Chris Paul's legacy is rooted in this season's playoffs
content: Dozens of NBA players have been mentored by the future Hall of Famer, and many of them are vying for the title.

title: Women's transfer rankings: No. 1 Audi Crooks commits to Oklahoma State
content: Audi Crooks is headed to Oklahoma St., Jordan Lee is bound for South Carolina and Kymora Johnson is staying at U.Va.

title: Men's college basketball buzz: State of blue blood rebuilds
content: North Carolina awaits a decision from Henri Veesaar while Kansas and Kentucky vie for the No. 1 recruit.

title: Stanley Cup playoffs daily: Can the Stars, Penguins and Senators even things up?
content: The Oilers and Ducks finally join the party. Here's what to watch, along with Sunday's highlights and stats.

title: Downed fences, beat-up mannequins headline KeyBank Center scene for Sabres' Game 1 win
content: Buffalo surged in the third period to win their first playoff game in 15 years, prompting memorable fan reactions from the Sabres faithful.

title: Blockbuster trade? New coach? Hard reset? The Warriors begin an offseason with massive uncertainty
content: Golden State enters another offseason in search of a co-star for Stephen Curry, and the Warriors might be searching for a new coach too.

title: 'Nobody was going to beat the 10th pick:' How the Bengals wooed the Giants into trading vet Dexter Lawrence
content: Lawrence informed the Giants he wanted a new deal or trade, the Giants didn't want to let him go -- until the price was right.

title: Hannah Green wins third LA Championship in four years
content: Hannah Green won the JM Eagle LA Championship on Sunday for the third time in our years and the first at El Caballero.

title: Jon Rahm wins in Mexico, capping wild week for LIV
content: Jon Rahm capped off a chaotic week on LIV Golf when he closed with a 7-under 64 on Sunday for a six-shot victory in LIV Golf Mexico City.

title: Is the Premier League now Man City's to lose? Bayern clinch Bundesliga, more
content: Man City's win over Arsenal has thrown the title race back in City's favor, plus Bayern clinch the Bundesliga and Man United beat Chelsea to move closer to a Champions League return as Gab Marcotti recaps the weekend.

title: Arsenal are still Premier League title favorites, and here's why
content: Arsenal suffered a huge blow to their Premier League title hopes in Sunday's 2-1 defeat at Manchester City.

title: The biggest question facing every WNBA team in training camp
content: How will Angel Reese fit the Dream? Will the Wings return to the playoffs? Can Caitlin Clark remain healthy?

title: Inside the fallout of the Dianna Russini and Mike Vrabel photos
content: How Dianna Russini and New England Patriots coach Mike Vrabel scrambled to respond to photos published in the New York Post.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Barcelona step up interest in Italy right back
content: Barcelona are stepping up their pursuit of Atalanta right back Marco Palestra, while Arsenal remain interested in Julián Álvarez.

title: 10 NFL draft prospects to put on your fantasy radar -- and three others to monitor
content: With the NFL draft nearly upon us, it's time to think about how the top prospects will fare in fantasy.

title: Draft guide: Rankings, strategies and more
content: Everything you need to know before your fantasy women's basketball draft, including rankings, tips and news.

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Musiri constituency looks for a major thrust to development
content: Musiri is home to the kora paai or mats woven with reed grass. Once an integral part of south Indian homes, kora paais today may have lost their lustre for city dwellers, but are they are still in demand in rural and semi-urban areas of the Tiruchi district.

title: Contemporary pop opera ‘Odyssey of Love’ to premier in Bengaluru from May 7 to 9
content: The Bangalore International Airport Limited says that inspired by Kalidasa’s Shakuntala, the Odyssey of Love is reimagined as a contemporary pop opera, blending movement, emotion, and music into a visually rich narrative

title: Opening of ‘polling material room’ in Kozhikode kicks up a row
content: UDF candidates of six constituencies in Kozhikode say strong room was opened under the supervision of officials without prior intimation to candidates. Collector and returning officer for Perambra say an unsealed room housing polling materials was opened in the presence of candidates’ agents to collect data for updating poll software

title: Power lust, caste pride, and electoral sabotage at the centre of Imayam’s Nammalu
content: The short story is driven by the authority of an unquestioned district secretary — a former minister and a caste Hindu — who acts against his own party’s candidate

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Regular water supply, rural bus services prominent demands in Rasipuram constituency
content: The constituency comprises Rasipuram taluk, Rasipuram Municipality, Vennandur, Athanur, Pattanam, Pillanallur, Seerapalli, and R. Pudhupatti town panchayats.

title: Bhumi puja performed for 56 power facilities worth ₹97 cr
content: As many as 56 power infrastructure facilities will be readied for the Godavari Pushkarams-2027 at a cost of ₹96.90 crore in Rajamahendravaram and Rajanagaram constituency; the infrastructure development would include laying underground power cables and setting up a power station

title: Kerala issues surgical safety protocol after alleged hospital lapses spark row
content: It aims to reduce errors during surgical procedures across all public health institutions, from primary health centres to tertiary care hospitals

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Industries leave Cuddalore constituency polluted; fisherfolk’s demands remain unmet
content: Cuddalore residents had high hopes when the State government announced the upgrade of the municipality to a corporation in October 2021. Five years later, they are disappointed that little has changed in the coastal town.

title: BDS student’s death: father alleges sustained harassment, seeks immediate arrest of accused
content: He accuses sections of college management and faculty of creating a hostile environment and claims that his son was pressured, isolated, and mentally harassed. Even if loan app operators deployed pressure tactics, the college should have informed the family, he adds.

title: Flight returns to Hubballi after being diverted due to inclement weather
content: A video clip of passengers in panic and in tears, which was sent to their family members, subsequently went viral on social media

title: West Bengal Assembly polls: Incidents of clash trigger security concerns as polls draw near
content: Mamata Banerjee alleges ‘selective’ targeting of Trinamool workers as part of preventive arrests. The EC and the State police take down over 11,000 social media posts

title: Fire breaks out in Rajasthan HPCL refinery, PM Modi cancels planned inauguration
content: The HPCL Rajasthan Refinery Limited (HRRL) refinery, a ₹79,459 crore joint venture between HPCL and the Government of Rajasthan, was to be inaugurated by PM Modi on April 21, 2026.

title: Railways to operate 908 special trains during summer
content: These trains will operate 18,262 trips to cater to the increased travel demand due to vacations and festivals

title: Elector mapping process leads to 9.8 lakh deletions in Odisha’s electoral rolls
content: Around two lakh Form-7 applications received after April 2, 2026 have been kept on hold; letter from the Office of the Chief Electoral Officer directs Electoral Registration Officers to carry out door-to-door survey, and physically verify the authenticity of voter rolls, which impacts final deletion

title: More than 700 activists write to EC alleging MCC violation in PM address to the nation
content: “If the said address to the nation was delivered with the prior permission of the Election Commission, then equal time on the national media should be provided to other parties to present their points of view,” the letter said.

title: Directorate of Civil Rights Enforcement SP writes to DGP alleging misuse of power by some IPS officers
content: The communication further claimed that a few officers from outside the State were allegedly targeting Kannada-origin officers and misusing their positions to suppress them.

title: TVK chief Vijay’s youth appeal: charisma or desire for change?
content: Conversations with a cross-section of voters in Madurai and its surroundings reveal a clear age divide in the political landscape

title: KTU Dean relieved of duties following demotion by parent department
content: The action is reportedly linked to allegations of financial irregularities during his tenure as a Principal at an IHRD-run engineering college

title: Modi, Revanth Reddy, Fadnavis, Yogi, Pawan Kalyan, Jr. NTR greet Chandrababu Naidu on 76th birthday
content: Andhra Pradesh Chief Minister N. Chandrababu Naidu received birthday greetings on Monday from Prime Minister Narendra Modi, five State counterparts, political rivals and Telugu film stars

title: Scanty summer showers amplify impact of heat in Kerala
content: State records 38% summer rain deficit as near-heatwave conditions prevail in several parts; hot and humid weather likely to continue at least until the end of the first week of May

title: Black panther to return to Vizag zoo after 40 years; formal release on April 21
content: The female black panther was brought from Assam State Zoo-cum-Botanical Garden in Guwahati last month as part of an inter-zoo exchange programme

title: Excise policy case: Delhi High Court judge Swarana K. Sharma refuses to recuse, rejects Kejriwal's plea
content: “A political leader cannot be allowed to damage an institution without any basis, as a personal attack on a judge is an attack on the judiciary itself,” Justice Sharma said

title: Supreme Court declines to review January 5 verdict denying bail to Umar Khalid
content: The January 5 judgment concluded that constitutional guarantees of personal liberty and life are not “absolute” or “unregulated”, but subject to restrictions on bail under special statutes like the UAPA

title: Now, a section of Muslims leadership defends Congress action against two MLCs in Karnataka
content: ‘The anti-party activities have caused confusion and resulted in division of votes, helping smaller parties and independent candidates’

title: Supreme Court to seek a report on the functioning of tribunals constituted to hear SIR appeals
content: Court announces decision after the oral mentioning of a petition claiming the tribunals formed to hear appeals against SIR exclusions/inclusions were not functional

title: Bapatla forms adventure tourism safety panel; paramotor, jet ski rides launched at Chirala
content: The committee will identify adventure zones, grant no-objection certificates (NOCs), monitor safety standards and act against violations, says Collector

title: Tourism takes a hit as water level of Thekkady lake dips
content: Forest department and Kerala Tourism Development Corporation reduce the seating capacity in their boating services, rendering tickets scarce for tourists, who mainly come to Thekkady to enjoy boating and watch wildlife. Drinking water projects in the Kumily and Chakkupallom panchayats too affected by the falling water level

title: Dam safety: Agencies in a race against time to  complete the  comprehensive dam safety evaluation
content: Owners of dams are required to complete the first CDSE within five years of the commencement of the Dam Safety Act

title: Kalyana Kranti continues to be relevant to modern society: Eshwar Khandre
content: The Forest, Ecology and Environment Minister and district in-charge was speaking after inaugurating Basava Jayanti celebrations in Bidar

title: "Arvind Kejriwal's Illusions No Ground To Recuse": Delhi Judge In Liquor Policy Case
content: "I reject this application because my oath is to the Constitution," Delhi High Court judge Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma said on the petition by Arvind Kejriwal

title: In Rare Sight, Tiger, Leopard, Cheetah Spotted Together In Ranthambore
content: In a rare and remarkable moment, three of the wild's most elusive predators, a tiger, a leopard and a cheetah, were sighted within the same landscape and time frame in Ranthambore's Zone 9, the Rajasthan Forest Department said.

title: Environmental Cess Hiked For Commercial Vehicles Entering Delhi From Today
content: The Municipal Corporation of Delhi implemented the new rates through a circular, sharply increasing entry costs for trucks and other heavy vehicles blamed for worsening the capital's air quality.

title: Guwahati Logs Record April Downpour, Weather Office Issues Heavy Rain Alert
content: After over 24 hours of waterlogging across several parts of Assam's Guwahati, the situation may worsen, with the India Meteorological Department (IMD) issuing a fresh alert for heavy rainfall across the state.

title: Inter-State Child Trafficking Racket Busted, Mastermind Arrested Using AI
content: The case began on April 6, with the kidnapping of a four-year-old boy named Dev in Gujarat's Banaskantha district.

title: Harvard Gave Epstein What He Wanted, Kept Giving After He Left Jail: Report
content: Newly released US Justice Department documents reviewed by The New York Times showed how Harvard professors continued to nurture relationship by visiting Jeffrey Epstein

title: Big Quake Strikes Japan Again: What Makes The Nation So Vulnerable
content: Japan was hit by a 7.4-magnitude earthquake on Monday, Japan's Meteorological Agency (JMA) said, issuing a tsunami warning for waves up to three metres (10 feet).

title: 7.4-Magnitude Earthquake Hits Japan: How Much Damage Can It Cause?
content: A powerful 7.4-magnitude earthquake struck northern Japan, triggering tsunami warnings,Japan's Meteorological Agency (JMA) said on Monday.

title: 20 Convicted For Beating To Death 2 Men In Assam 8 Years Ago
content: Videos of the horrific assault on Abhijit Nath-Nilotpal Das surfaced online, triggering widespread outrage and protests across Assam

title: In Bombed Facilities, Unstable Tunnels, US' Toughest Uranium Extraction Yet
content: Before US and Israeli strikes in June 2025, the International Atomic Energy Agency estimated that Iran possessed roughly 441 kilograms of uranium enriched to 60 per cent, alongside approximately 200 kilograms enriched to 20 per cent.

title: Iran Says "No Plans For Negotiation" After US Seizes Its Cargo Ship
content: US President Donald Trump said he was sending negotiators to Pakistan for talks on ending the war that engulfed the region and rattled global markets, while repeating threats to attack Iran's energy infrastructure if it did not make a deal.

title: Supreme Court Rejects Umar Khalid's Bail Review Plea In 2020 Delhi Riots Case
content: According to the Supreme Court's rules, review petitions are considered by judges who delivered a judgment or passed an order in chambers to remedy an apparent error or a resultant grave injustice that was a consequence of a decision of the top court

title: "No Evidence": Officer On Reports Of Plane Crash In Chhattisgarh
content: An aircraft reportedly crashed in a forest area of Chhattisgarh's Jashpur district after hitting a tree on Monday, officials said.

title: Video: Fire At Rajasthan Refinery Day Before Its Inauguration By PM Modi
content: The Pachpadra refinery in Balotra district is a joint venture between Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Limited (HPCL) and the government of Rajasthan.

title: No Interim Protection From Arrest For Missing TCS Case Accused Nida Khan
content: The Special Investigation Team (SIT) of the Nashik police, which is probing nine cases of molestation and harassment at the IT major's Nashik unit, has launched a search for Nida Khan in different parts of Maharashtra.

title: As Japan Gets Tsunami Alert, A Look At What Triggers Giant Waves
content: Japan has been hit by a powerful 7.4-magnitude earthquake and prompted authorities to issue tsunami warning.

title: 'Can't let politician ...': Delhi HC Judge rejects Kejriwal's recusal plea in excise case
content: Kejriwal had appeared in person before the court seeking recusal of Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma from hearing a CBI petition challenging his discharge in the liquor policy case. In the application, Kejriwal claimed that there was a grave, bona fide, and reasonable apprehension that the hearing in the matter before her would not be impartial and neutral.

title: Drones, robots & precision fire: How Ukraine is defying Russian juggernaut
content: Ukraine is showcasing remarkable resilience against Russia through its innovative defense industry. The nation is producing millions of drones, long-range missiles, and robotic systems. These advanced weapons allow Ukraine to strike deep behind enemy lines and preserve its soldiers. This technological prowess is enabling Ukraine to effectively counter a larger adversary, demonstrating a new model of national resistance.

title: America tells France that we do not support your probe against Elon Musk's X: What it said
content: The US Department of Justice has refused to assist France in its investigation into Elon Musk's X, citing concerns that French authorities are using their legal system to regulate American businesses and free expression. French officials had raided X's Paris office and sought interviews with Musk and other employees over issues like deepfakes and alleged bias.

title: How Middle East war could impact India’s trade and macro stability
content: NITI Aayog's report highlights the Middle East conflict's potential impact on India's trade and economy, risking the current account deficit and exchange rate. Instability also slows India-GCC FTA talks, hindering market access. Despite global uncertainty, merchandise trade remains steady, with services showing strong performance.

title: Big payback: US launches portal to refund $166 billion in collected tariffs
content: The US government has launched a tool to refund over $166 billion in tariffs imposed by former President Trump, following a Supreme Court ruling. Importers can now submit documentation to recover payments, with electronic refunds for approximately $127 billion in duties available initially.  The extent of consumer repayment hinges on companies sharing recovered funds.

title: PSL cracks down! Dasun Shanaka handed one-year ban after IPL switch
content: The Pakistan Cricket Board has banned Sri Lanka captain Dasun Shanaka for one year from the Pakistan Super League after he withdrew to join an IPL franchise. The PCB cited a breach of contractual obligations for the decision. Blessing Muzarabani also received a two-year ban for a similar issue, though his agent disputes the contract's validity.

title: As Amazon, SpaceX clash at FCC, Musk congratulates Bezos on New Glenn rocket launch
content: Blue Origin successfully launched its New Glenn rocket, showcasing reusable booster technology with a vertical landing.  This achievement, acknowledged by Elon Musk, comes amidst ongoing regulatory disputes between Amazon and SpaceX concerning satellite proposals.  Both companies are vying for FCC approval for large satellite constellations, highlighting a competitive landscape in space infrastructure.

title: 'A win-win for both nations!' Three-day India-US trade talks to begin this week
content: India and the US are resuming trade negotiations in Washington DC from April 20-22 to discuss the first phase of their bilateral trade agreement. The talks are being held under a revised framework following recent shifts in the US tariff regime, which have reduced India's previous trade advantages and necessitate recalibration of the agreement.

title: 'Bulldozer buddhi': Mahua calls Yogi Adityanath 'a joke' over Swami Vivekanand quote gaffe
content: TMC MP Mahua Moitra and her party have strongly criticized UP CM Yogi Adityanath for wrongly attributing Subhas Chandra Bose's famous quote to Swami Vivekananda. The TMC highlighted this gaffe as evidence of the BJP's "shocking ignorance and contempt for Bengal’s history," questioning their ambition to build 'Sonar Bangla' given their perceived lack of knowledge about the state's icons.

title: 'Bhooth Bangla' box office day 4: Akshay Kumar starrer records mild weekday growth
content: 'Bhooth Bangla,' featuring Akshay Kumar, has burst onto the cinematic scene, creeping close to Rs 100 crore in worldwide earnings over its opening weekend. This horror-comedy, helmed by Priyadarshan, saw an impressive Rs 58.75 crore net in India by the fourth day. Viewers are embracing the film with enthusiasm, making the weekday box office performance a hot topic of discussion. Read on to know more in detail.

title: OpenAI's top exec openly criticises company’s biggest rival Anthropic in employee memo
content: OpenAI's chief revenue officer has launched a sharp critique of rival Anthropic, questioning its revenue accounting, compute strategy, and company philosophy. The internal memo highlights concerns over Anthropic's reported revenue surge, suggesting it's inflated by $8 billion due to accounting practices.

title: Crude affair: Why the world is still hooked on oil despite better options
content: A global promise to shift from fossil fuels faces significant hurdles. Economic ties to oil and powerful industry lobbying impede progress. Political will is also a key factor. Despite these challenges, renewable energy sources are expanding rapidly worldwide, offering a glimpse of future change.

title: Lauren Kyle celebrates milestone as McDavid eyes Stanley Cup glory
content: Connor McDavid capped the regular season with four assists, clinching his sixth Art Ross Trophy as the Oilers secured home-ice advantage. His growing chemistry with linemates and a strong team performance signal readiness for the playoffs. Off the ice, Lauren Kyle’s proud reaction added a personal layer. With momentum and structure in place, Edmonton enters its first-round series against Anaheim with real expectations.

title: Hailee Steinfeld addresses viral baby rumors in candid new confession
content: Hailee Steinfeld, now a new mother with Josh Allen, shared that she deeply misses creating music videos, calling them a blend of her love for music and film. While embracing motherhood, she admitted the music industry no longer feels as creatively fulfilling. Still, she often thinks about returning to music, leaving the door open for a future comeback when the timing feels right.

title: Charlie Woods battles to T42 finish as Justin Thomas offers mentorship
content: Charlie Woods finished T42 at the Terra Cotta Invitational 2026 after improving across three rounds. Despite a strong recovery, his overall performance still showed inconsistency. His 2026 season has been tough, including a last-place finish at the Junior Invitational. Justin Thomas, speaking on the Smylie Show, offered support and praised Woods’ talent during this challenging phase.

title: 'New, huge quake': Japan's special advisory after 7.5 tremor; 80 cm tsunami recorded
content: Japan issued a special advisory warning of a heightened risk of a "huge" earthquake following a powerful 7.5 magnitude tremor off its northern coast. The quake triggered tsunami alerts and evacuations, though no major damage or injuries were reported. Officials stressed preparedness while urging residents to continue daily life.

title: 'Ghabraiye, aap Mullanpur mein hain': Arshdeep's jab at LSG goes viral - Watch
content: "Ghabraiye, aap Mullanpur mein hain," said Arshdeep Singh in a reel posted on his Instagram account after the match in Mullanpur, New Chandigarh.

title: JEE Mains 2026 Session 2 result out: Download scorecards here
content: JEE Main 2026 Session 2 results are out! Over 11 lakh candidates received their scores and ranks for B.E./B.Tech admissions. The NTA also released the final answer key, noting two dropped Physics questions. Top 2.5 lakh performers will qualify for JEE Advanced, crucial for IIT admissions. Check your scorecard now!

title: Rakesh Bedi recalls visiting Javed Akhtar for food, drinks in FTII days
content: Rakesh Bedi is experiencing a career resurgence with 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge'. A recent YouTube video by Farah Khan revealed their long-standing friendship, dating back to their teenage years when Bedi and his FTII friends would visit Khan's family for meals. Bedi's performance as Jameel Jamali in the hit film has garnered significant praise and box office success.

title: ‘Days of Our Lives’ actor Patrick Muldoon dies at 57 from heart attack
content: Veteran actor Patrick Muldoon, celebrated for his role as Austin Reed on 'Days of Our Lives,' has tragically passed away at 57 following a reported heart attack. Muldoon, who also starred in 'Melrose Place' and 'Starship Troopers,' was a beloved figure in television and film. His recent appearance at the Saturn Awards highlighted his enduring presence in the industry.

title: Arshad Warsi: Bachchans first to call at 12 am on birthday
content: Arshad Warsi shared a heartwarming detail about his birthday tradition, revealing that Amitabh and Jaya Bachchan are always among the first to call him right after midnight. The actor expressed his deep appreciation for the enduring love and support he receives from the film industry, highlighting his past collaborations with the veteran actors and his upcoming projects.

title: SC rejects Umar Khalid's plea against denial of bail in Delhi riots case
content: The Supreme Court has dismissed student activist Umar Khalid's review plea seeking bail in the 2020 Delhi riots case.  The court previously denied him bail, stating that prolonged detention alone isn't a reason for release. Khalid faces charges under the stringent UAPA. This decision upholds the earlier ruling, impacting his ongoing legal battle.

title: Sanjiv Goenka rushes to Arya, Zinta engages with Pant after PBKS hammer LSG
content: Lucknow Super Giants owner Sanjiv Goenka was seen congratulating Punjab Kings' Priyansh Arya after a dominant PBKS victory. Meanwhile, LSG skipper Rishabh Pant engaged in a chat with PBKS co-owner Preity Zinta. Punjab Kings secured their fifth win in six matches, while LSG suffered a third consecutive defeat, highlighting their struggles this season.

title: TCS Nashik case: No court relief for absconding pregnant employee
content: A pregnant TCS employee in Nashik, accused of religious harassment, was denied interim relief by the court. She sought anticipatory bail, citing her pregnancy and arguing she's not the main accused. The court will hear her plea again on April 27. The case involves allegations of hurting religious sentiments.

title: Stock market today: Which are the top gainers and losers in Nifty50 and BSE Sensex?
content: The Indian stock market saw mixed movements today, with the BSE and NSE experiencing gains and losses across various sectors. Trent and SBI emerged as top gainers on both exchanges, while companies like Titan and Axis Bank faced declines. Technology and banking stocks showed a general downward trend.

title: Taylor Swift spends $15m on jet makeover before Kelce wedding
content: Taylor Swift reportedly spent $15 million transforming her private jet, a Dassault Falcon 7X, to conceal its identity and avoid tracking. The move comes amid growing safety concerns as her relationship with Travis Kelce draws intense attention. Despite this, the couple continues to enjoy public outings ahead of their upcoming wedding.

title: ‘Pakistan don't have 190 strike-rate batters’: PSL coach’s candid admission
content: Former Pakistan all-rounder Azhar Mahmood defended Babar Azam, deeming it unfair to single him out for strike-rate issues in T20 cricket, arguing Pakistan lacks ultra-aggressive batters in the format. Mahmood emphasised that Babar sets the platform for others, and realistic expectations are needed, as the country doesn't possess consistently high-strike-rate players.

title: Setback for Vijay: Madras HC flags 'Rs 100 cr irregularity' in TVK chief's affidavit
content: A Bench comprising chief justice SA Dharmadhikari and Justice G Arul Murugan issued notices to Vijay, along with the Director General of Income Tax (Investigation), the Election Commission of India (ECI), and the Returning Officers for the Perambur and Tiruchirappalli (East) constituencies. The petitioner has alleged that the disappearance of a high-value asset amounts to a clear case of suppression of assets, raising serious concerns regarding beneficial ownership, routing of funds, and the concealment of material particulars.

title: Summer rush sorted: Indian Railways rolls out over 900 special trains
content: Indian Railways is launching 908 summer special trains, operating 18,262 trips between April 15 and July 15, 2026, to manage increased passenger demand. This initiative aims to ease waiting lists and enhance travel convenience across the country. A significant portion of these services is already open for booking.

title: 'Raja Shivaji' trailer: Riteish Deshmukh delivers visual masterpiece on Maratha history
content: Riteish Deshmukh’s 'Raja Shivaji' trailer showcases the life of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj with grand visuals and music by Ajay Atul. The film stars Abhishek Bachchan, Sanjay Dutt, and Genelia Deshmukh, features Salman Khan’s cameo, and highly anticipated releases worldwide on May 1 2026, clashing with 'The Devil Wears Prada 2'.

title: ‘All adjectives fall short’: Shreyas Iyer hails Sooryavanshi as ‘one for the future’
content: Punjab Kings skipper Shreyas Iyer lauded Rajasthan Royals' teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi as a "spectacular talent" and "one for the future" after his explosive IPL 2026 campaign. Iyer emphasized the importance of self-belief and playing fearlessly in T20 cricket, a philosophy he sees reflected in Sooryavanshi's game and his own openers.

title: 'Nitish Kumar was compromised': Rahul's big claim on 'Sushasan Babu's' Bihar exit
content: Rahul Gandhi has attacked the NDA. He claimed Nitish Kumar was compromised during his Tamil Nadu campaign. Nitish Kumar recently moved to the Rajya Sabha. This marks a significant shift in Bihar politics. The BJP will now lead the government in Bihar. The NDA secured a landslide victory in the Bihar assembly elections.

title: Massive fire at Rajasthan HPCL refinery ahead of PM Narendra Modi's launch event
content: A major fire erupted at the HPCL Pachpadra Refinery in Balotra on Monday, just a day before Prime Minister Narendra Modi's scheduled inauguration. The blaze, reportedly originating from an exchanger explosion at the main refinery unit, triggered panic. Firefighters and district administration teams swiftly responded, evacuating employees safely. Damage assessment awaits fire control.

title: 'I'm also someone’s father': Message inside a Pune auto touching hearts across India
content: A simple message inside a Pune auto-rickshaw, "Your safety is important to me," resonated deeply with content creator Unnati Devaliya.  The driver, Datta Rumale, a humble family man, was later identified and visited. His genuine kindness, even returning change and water, highlighted the profound impact of simple, caring gestures in everyday life.

title: Iran has closed Hormuz completely: What this means for India’s crude, LPG, LNG supplies?
content: Data from MarineTraffic shows that several Indian and foreign ships headed for Indian ports are still awaiting clearance near the Strait of Hormuz. According to the petroleum ministry, 17 vessels have been identified for evacuation.

title: 'No plans for talks with US': Iran hardens stance as ceasefire deadline looms
content: Iran has hardened its stance on US talks, stating negotiations will not occur "at any cost." This comes as the US threatens severe action if a deal isn't reached. Tehran emphasizes that diplomacy is linked to military posture and depends on national interests and constructive feedback from the US.

title: 'From chips to ships': PM Modi hails India-South Korea ties; signs several MoUs
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi welcomed South Korean President Lee Jae Myung, highlighting the deepening India-South Korea ties. Both leaders expressed commitment to transforming their trusted partnership into a futuristic one, aiming to boost bilateral trade to $50 billion by 2030 and enhance cooperation across various sectors, including strategic industries and the Indo-Pacific region.

title: Is Hormuz still operational? How gunfire, vessel seizure are testing the Iran-US ceasefire
content: The Strait of Hormuz faces severe disruption after a weekend of escalations, including ships coming under gunfire and a US seizure of an Iranian vessel. Commercial movement is chaotic, with vessels reversing course or drifting amid conflicting instructions. This directly confronts the fragile ceasefire, pushing the vital energy corridor to the brink.
